data: {"generalSituation":"A relatively humid easterly airstream will continue to affect the coast of eastern Guangdong tomorrow. The easterly airstream will be replaced by a southerly airstream in the following couple of days. It will be hot with one or two showers over the coast of southern China. Troughs of low pressure are expected to affect southern China in the middle and latter parts of next week. The weather will become unsettled over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260328","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"East force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with one or two showers. Coastal mist in the morning.
